title: Thai-Style Ham and Tagine Wrap
description: A fusion of Thai flavors with crispy ham and spicy tagine. Perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: 1. In a pan, heat 1 tsp of sesame oil over medium heat.
2. Add 2 slices of ham and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Add 1 tbsp of tagine and stir to combine.
4. Add 2 serrano peppers, sliced, and cook for an additional 1 minute.
5. Warm the crispy bread by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by placing the ham mixture onto the bread, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro.
7. Drizzle with rice vinegar and serve immediately.
8. Repeat with remaining ingredients to serve 4.
